prompt: An Atlantia swarm produced the following legal advice output for a client document review task: 'The indemnification clause in Section 7.3 is unenforceable under California law because it attempts to indemnify against intentional misconduct, which Civil Code 1668 prohibits.' Produce a full provenance audit for this output, identifying every assertion that requires source verification and flagging what a human reviewer must confirm before this output is delivered to the client.
_note: Tests: citation verification (CA Civil Code 1668 exists and says what is claimed), jurisdiction specificity (CA law, not federal), clause-level specificity (Section 7.3 must be cited), and escalation flag (legal output must have human attorney review before delivery — regulated domain).
